# Documentation Index

- New visitor: [Getting Started](GETTING_STARTED.md), [FAQ](FAQ.md), and the production site.
- Non-technical operator: [Deployment GitHub Web UI](DEPLOYMENT_GITHUB_WEB_UI.md), [Workflow Autopilot](WORKFLOW_AUTOPILOT.md), and [Troubleshooting](TROUBLESHOOTING.md).
- Developer: [Architecture](ARCHITECTURE.md), [Demo Catalog](DEMO_CATALOG.md), [Proof Objects](PROOF_OBJECTS.md), and [Release Checklist](RELEASE_CHECKLIST.md).
- Reviewer / risk / legal: [Claim Boundary](CLAIM_BOUNDARY.md), [Security Privacy Boundary](SECURITY_PRIVACY_BOUNDARY.md), [AGIALPHA Boundary](AGIALPHA_BOUNDARY.md), and [Publication Standard](PUBLICATION_STANDARD.md).
- Researcher: [Proof Objects](PROOF_OBJECTS.md), [Demo Catalog](DEMO_CATALOG.md), and route-specific reports.


## Shared boundary

Public demos are browser-local and public-safe: no user data wanted, no forms, no analytics, no cookies, no localStorage/sessionStorage, no public wallet connection, no public token approval, no public network switching, no public transaction broadcast, no funds moved, and no production authority. This material is not legal, financial, investment, tax, medical, audit, safety-certification, or professional advice. It does not claim achieved AGI, achieved ASI, empirical SOTA, external audit completed, production certified, safe autonomy proven, guaranteed return, or investment opportunity.
